examples: You have no reason to bamboozle me!
Bamboozle has nothing at all to do with wooden drinking cups.
"Perhaps if I wanted to be understood or to understand I would bamboozle myself into belief, but I am a reporter" (Graham Greene).
Perry is not the first GOP candidate to attempt to bamboozle his audience with such nonsense.
They tried to bamboozle the Wall Street analytical community into believing that it would fly anyway.
